repositories.rationale: Official Power Platform tools and resources hub.
Broad Power Apps samples covering Dataverse, canvas apps, model-driven apps, PCF, portals, and AI Builder.
Canonical connector catalog for Power Automate, Power Apps, and Azure Logic Apps.
Dataverse client SDK source used by Power Platform integrations.
Power Platform GitHub Actions for ALM and CI/CD workflows.
Microsoft agent SDK covering Copilot Studio, Microsoft 365, Teams, and webchat agents.
